docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER BOYTE, GARY LEE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER BOYTE, GARY LEE HEARING SET FOR MAY-01-2019 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF FEES AND COSTS FOR APPLICANT GARY LEE BOYTE FILED ON 5/1/19. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-01-2019 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER GARY LEE BOYTE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PETITIONER BOYTE, GARY LEE

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-17-2019 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER GARY LEE BOYTE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. THE APPLICANT SHOULD RE-FILE THE APPLICATION WITH PROPER LEGAL NAME OF GARY LEE BOYTE AND NOT THE PROPOSED NAME OF VERA GUADALUPE SEPULVEDA. PETITIONER NEEDS TO FILE A CHANGE OF ADDRESS TO CORRECT THE COURT'S RECORD. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
